## 🔗 Related Issue
Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## 🧩 Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New tool
- [ ] 🔧 Improvement to existing tool
- [ ] 💄 Style / UI change
- [ ] 📝 Documentation
- [ ] ⚙️ Infrastructure / CI

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] Tested in Chrome, Firefox, and/or Safari
- [ ] Tested on mobile viewport (≤ 480px)
- [ ] Dark mode and light mode both look correct
- [ ] All `onclick` functions exist and are verified
- [ ] No hardcoded colors — CSS variables used throughout
- [ ] New tool added to: `ROUTES`, `TOOLS` array, mega menu, sidebar, footer
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] `README.md` updated (if tool added/changed)
- [ ] `.files-for-ai/context.md` updated
- [ ] `.Backups/v{X}.{Y}.{Z}/` snapshot created (after merging)
